corrections.note: The right-side running head includes the section letter B.

corrections.current: στηριχθήσεται ἐπʼ αὐτὴν καὶ οὐ μὴ κλιθῇ,
corrections.correct: στηριχθήσεται ἐπʼ αὐτὴν καὶ οὐ μὴ κλιθῇ·
corrections.note: Printed punctuation is a raised dot, not comma.

corrections.current: καὶ ὑψώσει αὐτὸν παρὰ τοὺς πλησίον αὐτοῦ,
corrections.correct: καὶ ὑψώσει αὐτὸν παρὰ τοὺς πλησίον αὐτοῦ,
corrections.note: The line begins with a paragraph mark ¶ before καί, omitted in the transcription.
A separator bar follows C before the next variant.
There is a space after B before the following sigla.
The apparatus reads ποτιει B before the sigla ℵAC.

corrections.current: αγαλλιαματος] + ευφροσυνη ℵ* (improb ευφρ. ℵc.a) A
corrections.correct: αγαλλιαματος] + ευφροσυνει B* (improb ευφρ. ℵc.a) A
corrections.note: The witness is B* and the added form reads ευφροσυνει, not ευφροσυνη with ℵ*.
The variant is ανοι, not ανοι.
The omitted witness is B, not ℵ.

notes: Body text largely matches. Left-margin parenthetical line numbers (4), (5), (8), (10) are correctly transcribed as marginal indicators, not verse numbers. Apparatus contains several misread sigla, especially confusion between B and ℵ.
